games.name: Gift Puzzle Saga
games.description: Join Santa&amp;rsquo;s team and tidy up the workshop! In this festive puzzle game, your goal is to clear the board by dropping gifts into lanes and stacking three of a kind. Plan your moves carefully&amp;mdash;if the stacks get too high, the warehouse will overflow! Enjoy 16 challenging levels at your own pace with no time limits. If no match is made, the stack of three gifts moves back to the warehouse. If no room is available for the stack the level ends.
